citation: Chisholm DA, Black AM, Palacios-Derflingher L, Eliason PH, Schneider KJ, Emery CA, Hagel BE. (2020). Mouthguard use in youth ice hockey and the risk of concussion: nested case-control study of 315 cases. British journal of sports medicine.
sport_raw: youth ice hockey (CA — case-control nested in prospective cohorts)
rate_denominator_raw: (%) of 315 concussion cases wearing MG at injury
extraction_notes: Cases = 315 concussions. 236/315 (75%) wore MG at time of injury.

citation: Chisholm DA, Black AM, Palacios-Derflingher L, Eliason PH, Schneider KJ, Emery CA, Hagel BE. (2020). Mouthguard use in youth ice hockey and the risk of concussion: nested case-control study of 315 cases. British journal of sports medicine.
sport_raw: youth ice hockey (CA — case-control nested in prospective cohorts)
rate_denominator_raw: (%) of 270 control (non-concussion) cases wearing MG at injury
extraction_notes: Controls = 270 non-concussion injuries. 224/270 (83%) wore MG. Any MG vs none: adjusted OR for concussion 0.36 (95% CI 0.17-0.73). Off-the-shelf MG: aOR 0.31 (0.14-0.65). Custom-fit MG: non-significant.
